title: severinia buxifolia
intro: Severinia buxifolia, also known as Chinese box myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Severinia buxifolia are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and may be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
